case_title: VICTORIA SOLOMON VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-04-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF VICTORIA SOLOMON IS NOT PRESENT BUT APPEARING ON HER BEHALF IS MEDA SHAHRAN, COMMITTIEE FOR RACIAL JUSTICE COORDINATOR. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO REPRESENTED BY ZOE GRIMALDI, INTERN, GRACE GLENN, CLAIM ADJUSTER & MARLEEN GREEN, CLAIM ADDUSTER. HONORABLE PANG LY ALLOWS THE DECLARATION AND THE REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. DISCOVERY WAS COMPLETED BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE AND THE CITY AND COUNTY. MS JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST DUE TO MEDICAL ISSUE.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-04-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOLOMON, VICTORIA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARLEENA GREEN, CLAIM ADJUSTER FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF VICTORIA SOLOMON IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO REPRESENTED BY PARALEGAL FOR CCSF DWAYNE LOCIETT IS PRESENT. JUDGE SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SOLOMON, VICTORIA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.); DOCUMENT MARKED - 'BY FAX' FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOLOMON, VICTORIA

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOLOMON, VICTORIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $0. SERVED MAY-04-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
